message:
ci: Use namespace-profile-default runner

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/z4ojvn6lyy

files.patch:
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ on:
 jobs:
   build:
     name: Lint, Test, Type Check, Build
-    runs-on: macos-14
+    runs-on: namespace-profile-default
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ jobs:
 
   deploy:
     name: Deploy to Cloudflare
-    runs-on: macos-14
+    runs-on: namespace-profile-default
     needs: [build]
     if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push' }}
     environment:
